summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for Planet Knowledge. All 32 core API tests passed (100%). Fixed a critical bug in the Excel Analyzer module where session management was using undefined in-memory dictionary instead of MongoDB.
passed_tests: Health endpoint /api/health returns 200 with status healthy
GET /api/auth/me returns current user info with token
POST /api/chats/{id}/messages sends message and gets AI response
POST /api/analyzer/ask returns error for invalid session
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /app/backend/routes/analyzer.py - The ask/get/delete session endpoints were using undefined 'analysis_sessions' dictionary instead of MongoDB. Changed to use async get_session() and save_session() functions that properly interact with MongoDB.
seed_data_creation: Test projects, chats, and sources created dynamically during testing and cleaned up after each test class
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core backend APIs tested and working: health, auth, projects CRUD, chats CRUD, quick chats, source mode toggle, sources upload, messages, save-to-knowledge, Excel analyzer, global sources, and admin endpoints. Fixed bug in analyzer.py where session management was broken. The new modular route files in /app/backend/routes/ are NOT yet integrated into server.py - the main server.py (3700+ lines) is still being used. Test credentials: admin@admin.com / admin123

bug_fix_applied.issue: Session management functions (ask, get_session, delete_session, export_to_excel, export_to_pdf) were referencing undefined 'analysis_sessions' dictionary
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed all references to use async MongoDB helper functions: get_session(), save_session(), delete_session()
bug_fix_applied.impact: Excel/CSV Analyzer now properly persists sessions in MongoDB instead of failing with NameError
